name: securechain-manual-test
description: A single, realistic manifest for manually testing the full push -> scan -> fix -> rescan loop yourself. 15 dependencies: 9 clean, 1 Low (a behavioral-only flag with no CVE), 2 Medium, 1 High, 2 Critical (all with real CVEs and real fixed versions except where noted). Every non-Safe entry blocks the CI/CD gate until you either upgrade it or record an exception.
